content: Trust in Yahweh with all your heart, and don't lean on your own understanding. In all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make your paths straight.
Keep your heart with all diligence, for out of it is the wellspring of life.
A truthful witness tells what is right, but a false witness tells lies.
A gentle answer turns away wrath, but a harsh word stirs up anger.
A man's heart plans his course, but Yahweh directs his steps.
A friend loves at all times; and a brother is born for adversity.
Train up a child in the way he should go, and when he is old he will not depart from it.
